description: Letter from Ḥayyim. In Hebrew. Dating: Late 16th or 17th century, based on Avraham David's assessment. The language is very flowery. The writer mentions Manzal = Manzala, a town on the lake of the same name near Damietta. Also mentions business in she-asses.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
